---
title: "Kate Colvin"
output:
  html_document:
    css: style.css
    toc: false
---

<div class="container">

<nav>
<a href="#about">About</a>
<a href="#research">Research</a>
<a href="#projects">Projects</a>
<a href="#contact">Contact</a>
</nav>

<div class="divider"></div>

<section id="about" class="hero">

<div class="left-column">

<img src="images/kate_crop.jpeg" class="profile-photo">

<h2>Kate Colvin</h2>

<p class="subtitle">
PhD Student, Biostatistics
</p>

<p class="institution">
Columbia University
</p>

<div class="buttons">
<a href="cv.pdf" class="button">CV</a>
<a href="https://github.com/kaaateco" class="button">GitHub</a>
<a href="mailto:kac2301@cumc.columbia.edu" class="button">Email</a>
</div>

</div>

<div class="right-column">

<h1>About Me</h1>

<p>
I am a third-year PhD student in Biostatistics at the Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health.
My current research interests are in clinical trial methodology, causal inference methods, mental health, and cancer.
</p>

<p>
Before beginning my PhD, I earned bachelor's degrees in Statistics and Public Health from UC Berkeley, where I also led the undergraduate Student Association for Applied Statistics (SAAS). 


I have previously been part of research at the Environmental Health Sciences Division at UC Berkeley, the Plastic and Reconstructive Surgery Service at Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center, and the Department of Biostatistics at University of Michigan. 
</p>

</div>

</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<section id="research">

<div class="two-column">

<div>

<h2>Research Interests</h2>

<ul>
<li>Clinical Trial Methodology</li>
<li>Causal Inference</li>
<li>Mental Health</li>
<li>Cancer Research</li>
<li>Statistical Computing</li>
</ul>

</div>

<div>

<h2>Education</h2>

<h3>Columbia University</h3>

<p>
PhD in Biostatistics<br>
2024–Present
</p>

<h3>University of California, Berkeley</h3>

<p>
BA Statistics<br>
BA Public Health<br>
2020–2024
</p>

</div>

</div>

</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<section id="projects">

<h2>Projects</h2>

<h3>Clinical Trial Dashboard</h3>

<p>
Interactive visualization of adaptive clinical trials using R Shiny.
</p>

<h3>Data Visualization</h3>

<p>
A collection of statistical graphics and reproducible analyses.
</p>

</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<section id="contact">

<h2>Contact</h2>

<p>

Department of Biostatistics<br>

Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health

</p>

<p>

Email:
<a href="mailto:kac2301@cumc.columbia.edu">
kac2301@cumc.columbia.edu
</a>

</p>

</section>

</div>
